get.description:
Returns a paginated list of bulk validation jobs for the authenticated tenant. Results are scoped to the tenant resolved from the `Authorization` bearer token.

Use `cursor` from `nextCursor` in the response to retrieve subsequent pages. Results are sorted by `created_time` descending (newest first) by default.

parameters.name: scope

schema.description: Scope filter. One of `"all"`, `"current-user"`, `"current-org"`. Defaults to `"all"`.
schema.title: Scope

parameters.description: Scope filter. One of `"all"`, `"current-user"`, `"current-org"`. Defaults to `"all"`.

parameters.name: campaignId

schema.description: Filter to jobs with this campaign ID.
schema.title: Campaignid

parameters.description: Filter to jobs with this campaign ID.

parameters.name: batchName

schema.description: Case-insensitive substring search on batch name.
schema.title: Batchname

parameters.description: Case-insensitive substring search on batch name.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by job status. One of `not_started`, `running`, `canceling`, `succeeded`, `partially_succeeded`, `failed`, `canceled`.
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by job status. One of `not_started`, `running`, `canceling`, `succeeded`, `partially_succeeded`, `failed`, `canceled`.

parameters.name: sortOrder

schema.description: Sort direction. One of `"desc"` (default, newest first), `"asc"`.
schema.title: Sortorder

parameters.description: Sort direction. One of `"desc"` (default, newest first), `"asc"`.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the previous response `nextCursor`. Omit for the first page.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the previous response `nextCursor`. Omit for the first page.

parameters.name: pageSize

schema.description: Number of jobs per page. Range 1–100, default 20.
schema.title: Pagesize

parameters.description: Number of jobs per page. Range 1–100, default 20.

403.description: Tenant not found or caller not authorized.

post.summary: Submit a batch of assets for brand compliance validation
post.description:
Enqueues a bulk brand compliance validation job for the authenticated tenant. The tenant is resolved from the `Authorization` bearer token — callers do not supply a tenant ID directly.

Returns submission accounting (`submittedCount`, `acceptedCount`, `rejectedCount`). Use the `statusUrl` or `GET /api/v1/review-and-approve/{job_id}` to poll for progress, and `GET /api/v1/review-and-approve/{job_id}/items` for per-asset results.

403.description: Tenant not found or caller not authorized.

400.description: Request body failed validation (e.g. missing required field).

get.summary: Poll the status of a bulk validation job
get.description:
Returns the current status of a bulk validation job, including per-state item counts (`counts`, `succeededCount`, `failedCount`, `pendingCount`). The tenant resolved from `Authorization` must match the submitting tenant.

Fetch individual asset results from `GET /api/v1/review-and-approve/{job_id}/items`.

403.description: Tenant not found or caller not authorized.

400.description: Invalid or unknown batch job ID.

get.summary: Fetch per-asset validation results for a bulk job
get.description:
Returns validation results for individual assets within a bulk job. While the batch is still running, only assets that have reached a terminal state (`SUCCEEDED` or `FAILED`) are included — poll again as `pendingCount` decreases. Once the batch is complete, all submitted assets are present.

Each item contains `validationErrors` and `validationSummary` on `SUCCEEDED`, or a `message` on `FAILED`.

Use `hasErrors=true` to return only succeeded items with validation errors, or `hasErrors=false` to return only succeeded items with no errors. Omit to return all items regardless of error state.

parameters.name: hasErrors

schema.description: Filter succeeded items by error presence. `true` → items with errors only; `false` → items without errors only. Non-succeeded items are unaffected by this filter.
schema.title: Haserrors

parameters.description: Filter succeeded items by error presence. `true` → items with errors only; `false` → items without errors only. Non-succeeded items are unaffected by this filter.

403.description: Tenant not found or caller not authorized.

400.description: Invalid or unknown batch job ID.

get.summary: Fetch the detail record for a single item in a bulk validation job
get.description:
Returns the full detail record for one asset within a bulk validation job, including processing diagnostics (`storageValidation`, `attemptCount`, `attempts`), the `effectiveContext` applied to this specific item, and the structured `error` object on FAILED or `result` on SUCCEEDED.

Use `GET /api/v1/review-and-approve/{job_id}/items` to list all items and identify their `itemId`s.

403.description: Tenant not found or caller not authorized.

400.description: Invalid job ID or item ID.

404.description: Item not found within the specified job.

put.description:
Request cancellation of a bulk validation job. In-flight items are allowed to complete; newly dispatched items are marked `canceled`. The job transitions to `canceled` once all items reach a terminal state.

Canceling an already-terminal job is a no-op — the current state is returned unchanged.

403.description: Tenant not found or caller not authorized.

get.summary: List validation comments for a bulk item
get.description:
Retrieve validation comments for a single succeeded bulk item with cursor-based pagination. Includes pipeline-generated comments (`errorSource: pipeline`) and user-created comments (`errorSource: user`).

Use `cursor` from `nextCursor` in the response to fetch the next page.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Number of comments per page. Range 1–100, default 20.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Number of comments per page. Range 1–100, default 20.

parameters.name: cursor

schema.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the previous response `nextCursor`. Omit for the first page.
schema.title: Cursor

parameters.description: Opaque pagination cursor from the previous response `nextCursor`. Omit for the first page.

403.description: Tenant not found or caller not authorized.

410.description: Job has expired and been purged.

post.summary: Add a user-created comment to a bulk item
post.description: Add a human-authored validation comment to a succeeded bulk item. Only `errorSummary` (and optional `userName`) are accepted — attributions, regions, and tags are reserved for pipeline-generated comments. The new comment is returned with `errorSource: user`.

403.description: Tenant not found or caller not authorized.

404.description: Job or item not found, or item not yet succeeded.

patch.summary: Update a validation comment on a bulk item
patch.description:
Apply a feedback action to a validation comment on a bulk item.

**Actions:**

`setAccepted` — accept or un-accept a comment:
```json
{ "action": "setAccepted", "accepted": true }
```

`setRejected` — reject or un-reject a comment with optional reason:
```json
{ "action": "setRejected", "rejected": true, "reason": "incorrectAssessment", "details": "..." }
```

`editContent` — update the comment summary and/or remove attribution rows:
```json
{ "action": "editContent", "errorSummary": "Updated description", "removeCorpusAttributionIds": [] }
```

`setAccepted` and `setRejected` are mutually exclusive.

403.description: Tenant not found or caller not authorized.

404.description: Job, item, or comment not found.

422.description: Business rule violation (mutual exclusivity, no-op edit, etc.).

value.title: Value
value.description: Activation context value forwarded to the validation engine.

documentId.title: Documentid
documentId.description: Identifier of the source document or asset.

documentUrl.title: Documenturl
documentUrl.description: Signed URL for accessing the source document.

chunkUrl.title: Chunkurl
chunkUrl.description: Signed URL for the specific chunk within the document, if applicable.

regions.title: Regions
regions.description: Regions within the document that support this attribution. Empty list when no specific region applies.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Open-ended key-value pairs, e.g. severity or guideline section.

accepted.title: Accepted
accepted.description: Whether a reviewer has accepted (acknowledged) this violation.

rejected.title: Rejected
rejected.description: Whether a reviewer has rejected (disputed) this violation.

rejectionReason.title: Rejectionreason
rejectionReason.description: Free-text reason provided when the violation was rejected.

rejectionDetails.title: Rejectiondetails
rejectionDetails.description: Structured rejection metadata. Shape determined by brand-brain.

errorSource.title: Errorsource
errorSource.description: Service or model component that produced this violation.

userName.title: Username
userName.description: Display name of the reviewer who last acted on this violation.

imsUserId.title: Imsuserid
imsUserId.description: IMS user ID of the reviewer who last acted on this violation.

clientItemId.title: Clientitemid
clientItemId.description: Caller-assigned identifier echoed from the submission.

asset.description: Asset details echoed from the submission.

effectiveContext.title: Effectivecontext
effectiveContext.description: Merged context applied to this item — combines batch-level context with any per-asset overrides.

latestChildJobId.title: Latestchildjobid
latestChildJobId.description: ID of the most recent single-validate job spawned for this item, if any.

attemptCount.title: Attemptcount
attemptCount.description: Number of processing attempts made so far.

storageValidation.description: Result of the pre-processing storage reachability check.

error.description: Populated on FAILED. Null when the item succeeded or is still processing.

result.description: Populated on SUCCEEDED. Contains validation summary and error list.

thumbnailUrl.title: Thumbnailurl
thumbnailUrl.description: Presigned URL for a thumbnail preview of the asset. Populated on SUCCEEDED.

attempts.title: Attempts
attempts.description: Ordered list of processing attempt records. Shape is determined by brand-brain and may evolve.

BulkItemDetailResponse.title: BulkItemDetailResponse
BulkItemDetailResponse.description:
Full detail record for a single asset within a bulk validation job.

Returned by ``GET /api/v1/bulk-validate-assets/{job_id}/items/{item_id}``.

code.title: Code
code.description: Machine-readable error code for programmatic handling.

message.title: Message
message.description: Human-readable detail. May be empty string.

retryable.title: Retryable
retryable.description: Whether submitting the same asset again may succeed.

source.title: Source
source.description: Service component that produced the error.

BulkItemError.title: BulkItemError
BulkItemError.description: Structured error returned when an individual asset fails processing.

clientItemId.title: Clientitemid
clientItemId.description: Caller-assigned identifier echoed from the submission.

assetName.title: Assetname
assetName.description: Asset file name echoed from the submission.

effectiveContext.title: Effectivecontext
effectiveContext.description: Merged context applied to this item — combines batch-level context with any per-asset overrides.

latestChildJobId.title: Latestchildjobid
latestChildJobId.description: ID of the most recent single-validate job spawned for this item, if any.

attemptCount.title: Attemptcount
attemptCount.description: Number of processing attempts made so far.

error.description: Structured error object. Populated on FAILED, null otherwise.

result.description: Validation outcome. Populated on SUCCEEDED, null otherwise.

errorCode.title: Errorcode
errorCode.description: Flat error code. Convenience duplicate of error.code when error is set.

errorMessage.title: Errormessage
errorMessage.description: Flat error message. Convenience duplicate of error.message when error is set.

validationErrors.title: Validationerrors
validationErrors.description: Populated on SUCCEEDED. Empty list means no violations found.

thumbnailUrl.title: Thumbnailurl
thumbnailUrl.description: Presigned URL for a thumbnail preview of the asset. Populated on SUCCEEDED.

tags.title: Tags
tags.description: Open-ended key-value pairs attached to this item by brand-brain.

BulkItemResult.title: BulkItemResult
BulkItemResult.description:
Summary record for a single asset within a bulk job.

Returned as elements of the ``items`` list from
``GET /api/v1/bulk-validate-assets/{job_id}/items``.
Items in non-terminal states (e.g. POLLING) are included while the batch
is still running; poll again as ``pendingCount`` decreases.

validationSummary.description: High-level narrative summary of the validation outcome.

validationErrors.title: Validationerrors
validationErrors.description: List of specific brand guideline violations. Empty list means compliant.

BulkItemValidationResult.title: BulkItemValidationResult
BulkItemValidationResult.description:
Validation outcome embedded in ``result`` when an item reaches SUCCEEDED.

Mirrors the result fields from a single-asset validate poll.

items.title: Items
items.description: Jobs for this page, ordered by the requested sort field.

nextCursor.title: Nextcursor
nextCursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor. Pass as ``cursor`` on the next request to retrieve the following page. Null when this is the last page.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of jobs matching the filter. May be null.

clientItemId.title: Clientitemid
clientItemId.description: Caller-assigned identifier for this asset; echoed back in results.

context.title: Context
context.description: Per-asset context items applied in addition to (and overriding) any batch-level context.

BulkValidateAssetItem.title: BulkValidateAssetItem
BulkValidateAssetItem.description: A single asset entry inside a bulk validation request.

succeededWithErrors.title: Succeededwitherrors
succeededWithErrors.description: Succeeded items that have at least one validation error. Populated only on the single-job GET response; null on list responses.

succeededWithoutErrors.title: Succeededwithouterrors
succeededWithoutErrors.description: Succeeded items with no validation errors. Populated only on the single-job GET response; null on list responses.

BulkValidateCounts.title: BulkValidateCounts
BulkValidateCounts.description: Per-state item counts returned while polling a bulk validation job.

byErrorCode.title: Byerrorcode
byErrorCode.description: Count of failed items grouped by error code.

BulkValidateFailureSummary.title: BulkValidateFailureSummary
BulkValidateFailureSummary.description: Breakdown of item failures when a bulk validation batch fails.

items.title: Items
items.description: Item records for this page. Includes items in all states — non-terminal items (e.g. POLLING) are present while the batch is running.

nextCursor.title: Nextcursor
nextCursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor. Pass as a query parameter on the next request to retrieve the following page. Null when this is the last page.

total.title: Total
total.description: Total number of items in the job. May be null until fully known.

statusUrl.title: Statusurl
statusUrl.description: Canonical URL to poll this job's status.

cancelUrl.title: Cancelurl
cancelUrl.description: URL to cancel this batch job.

context.title: Context
context.description: Batch-level context echoed from the submission.

pendingCount.title: Pendingcount
pendingCount.description: Items not yet in a terminal state (waiting + running).

failureSummary.description: Breakdown of item failures when the batch fails.

totalPageSummary.description: Aggregate page-level processing counts across all assets in the batch.

expiresAt.title: Expiresat
expiresAt.description: When brand-brain will purge results for this batch.

BulkValidateJobResponse.title: BulkValidateJobResponse
BulkValidateJobResponse.description:
Response returned when polling a bulk validation job status.

The ``counts`` breakdown and convenience scalars (``succeededCount``,
``failedCount``, ``pendingCount``) let callers decide whether to keep
polling without parsing the full ``counts`` object.

campaignId.title: Campaignid
campaignId.description: Optional campaign identifier for grouping results.

clientRequestId.title: Clientrequestid
clientRequestId.description: Idempotency key. Duplicate submissions with the same ID are deduplicated.

context.title: Context
context.description: Batch-level context items applied to all assets unless overridden per-asset. Omit to run full validation.

retentionPolicy.title: Retentionpolicy
retentionPolicy.description: How long brand-brain should retain results for this batch.

assets.title: Assets
assets.description: One or more assets to validate in this batch.

BulkValidateRequest.title: BulkValidateRequest
BulkValidateRequest.description:
Bulk validation request payload.

``tenantId`` is intentionally absent — bb-cortex resolves it from the
``Authorization`` bearer token and injects it before forwarding to brand-brain.

statusUrl.title: Statusurl
statusUrl.description: Canonical URL to poll this job's status.

cancelUrl.title: Cancelurl
cancelUrl.description: URL to cancel this batch job.

submittedCount.title: Submittedcount
submittedCount.description: Total number of asset items received in the request.

acceptedCount.title: Acceptedcount
acceptedCount.description: Items accepted into the processing queue.

rejectedCount.title: Rejectedcount
rejectedCount.description: Items rejected before queueing (e.g. schema or size violations).

rejections.title: Rejections
rejections.description: Details for each rejected item. Empty list when rejectedCount is 0. Shape is determined by brand-brain.

BulkValidateSubmitResponse.title: BulkValidateSubmitResponse
BulkValidateSubmitResponse.description:
Response returned immediately after submitting a bulk validation job (202).

Contains submission accounting fields that confirm how many items were
accepted into the queue. Use ``statusUrl`` to start polling.

errorSummary.title: Errorsummary
errorSummary.description: Human-readable description of the validation finding.
examples: Logo clear space is insufficient on mobile breakpoint.

userName.title: Username
userName.description: Display name of the user creating this comment.

CreateValidationErrorRequest.title: CreateValidationErrorRequest
CreateValidationErrorRequest.description: Request body for user-created validation comments.

removeCorpusAttributionIds.title: Removecorpusattributionids
removeCorpusAttributionIds.description: IDs of corpus attribution rows to remove.

removeAssetAttributionIds.title: Removeassetattributionids
removeAssetAttributionIds.description: IDs of asset attribution rows to remove.

EditContentAction.title: EditContentAction
EditContentAction.description: Update a comment's summary text and/or remove specific attribution rows.

value.description: Brand dimension identifier to scope validation to. Valid values are provided by your Adobe representative during onboarding.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs forwarded to the validation engine.

Pointer.title: Pointer
Pointer.description: Normalised (0–1) point coordinate within an asset.

boundingBox.description: Populated when regionType is boundingBox, null otherwise.

pointer.description: Centroid of the region in normalised coordinates. May accompany a boundingBox.

message.title: Message
message.description: Human-readable description of what was wrong with the request.
examples:
1 validation error for ValidateAssetRequest
tenantId
  Field required

accepted.title: Accepted
accepted.description: Whether the comment is marked as accepted.

SetAcceptedAction.title: SetAcceptedAction
SetAcceptedAction.description: Accept or un-accept a validation comment.

rejected.title: Rejected
rejected.description: Whether the comment is marked as rejected.

SetRejectedAction.title: SetRejectedAction
SetRejectedAction.description: Reject or un-reject a validation comment with an optional predefined reason.

totalPages.title: Totalpages
totalPages.description: Total number of pages across all assets in the batch.

TotalPageSummary.title: TotalPageSummary
TotalPageSummary.description: Aggregate page-level processing counts for a bulk validation job.

value.title: Value
value.description: Presigned or publicly accessible URL of the asset.

nextCursor.title: Nextcursor
nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page. Null when this is the last page.

ValidationErrorsPage.title: ValidationErrorsPage
ValidationErrorsPage.description: Paginated list of validation comments (errors) for a completed job or bulk item.

HTTPBearer.description: IMS Bearer token. Enter the raw token — 'Bearer' prefix is added automatically.
